name: atelier
description: Agentic design suite for brand concepting, design-system extraction, logo production, image optimization, visual QA, and asset handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic design suite and asset workshop.
interface.longDescription: Atelier routes professional design tasks across brand concepting, design-system extraction, logo and icon production, image optimization, token handoff, UI visual QA, and final asset packaging.
defaultPrompt: Use Atelier to turn this visual reference into a design system.
Use Atelier to create a brand direction and logo asset plan.
Use Atelier to optimize and package these design assets.
